plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Optional coarse background location lets Carrier Snail re-aim while the app is closed. Denying it keeps foreground-only mode.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Carrier Snail uses coarse location while open so snails know where to crawl.

infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Optional coarse background location lets Carrier Snail re-aim while the app is closed. Denying it keeps foreground-only mode.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Carrier Snail uses coarse location while open so snails know where to crawl.
